tEn: Phi-4-Mini Technical Report: Compact yet Powerful Multimodal Language Models via Mixture-of-LoRAs
tZh: Phi-4-Mini技术报告：通过混合LoRA实现紧凑而强大的多模态语言模型
sEn: Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal achieve state-of-the-art performance with compact 3.8B parameters via Mixture-of-LoRAs.
sZh: Phi-4-Mini和Phi-4-Multimodal通过混合LoRA技术，以38亿参数实现紧凑而强大的多模态性能。
absEn: We introduce Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal, compact yet highly capable language and multimodal models. Phi-4-Mini is a 3.8-billion-parameter language model trained on high-quality web and synthetic data, significantly outperforming recent open-source models of similar size and matching the performance of models twice its size on math and coding tasks requiring complex reasoning. This achievement is driven by a carefully curated synthetic data recipe emphasizing high-quality math and coding datasets. Compared to its predecessor, Phi-3.5-Mini, Phi-4-Mini features an expanded vocabulary size of 200K tokens to better support multilingual applications, as well as group query attention for more efficient long-sequence generation. Phi-4-Multimodal is a multimodal model that integrates text, vision, and speech/audio input modalities into a single model. Its novel modality extension approach leverages LoRA adapters and modality-specific routers to allow multiple inference modes combining various modalities without interference. For example, it now ranks first in the OpenASR leaderboard to date, although the LoRA component of the speech/audio modality has just 460 million parameters. Phi-4-Multimodal supports scenarios involving (vision + language), (vision + speech), and (speech/audio) inputs, outperforming larger vision-language and speech-language models on a wide range of tasks. Additionally, we experiment to further train Phi-4-Mini to enhance its reasoning capabilities. Despite its compact 3.8-billion-parameter size, this experimental version achieves reasoning performance on par with or surpassing significantly larger models, including DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B.
absZh: 我们介绍了Phi-4-Mini和Phi-4-Multimodal，这是紧凑但功能强大的语言和多模态模型。Phi-4-Mini是一个38亿参数的语言模型，在高质量网络和合成数据上训练，显著优于近期同尺寸开源模型，并在需要复杂推理的数学和编码任务上达到两倍尺寸模型的性能。这一成就得益于精心策划的合成数据配方，强调高质量的数学和编码数据集。与其前身Phi-3.5-Mini相比，Phi-4-Mini扩展了词汇量至20万token，以更好地支持多语言应用，并采用分组查询注意力以实现更高效的长序列生成。Phi-4-Multimodal是一个多模态模型，将文本、视觉和语音/音频输入模态集成到单一模型中。其新颖的模态扩展方法利用LoRA适配器和模态特定路由器，允许结合多种模态的多种推理模式而互不干扰。例如，它目前在OpenASR排行榜上排名第一，尽管语音/音频模态的LoRA组件仅有4.6亿参数。Phi-4-Multimodal支持（视觉+语言）、（视觉+语音）和（语音/音频）输入场景，在广泛任务上优于更大的视觉语言和语音语言模型。此外，我们实验进一步训练Phi-4-Mini以增强其推理能力。尽管其紧凑的38亿参数规模，该实验版本在推理性能上达到或超越显著更大的模型，包括DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B。

contrib.en: Introduces Phi-4-Mini, a 3.8B parameter language model outperforming models twice its size on math and coding.
contrib.zh: 提出Phi-4-Mini，一个38亿参数的语言模型，在数学和编码任务上超越两倍大小的模型。

contrib.en: Proposes Phi-4-Multimodal with a novel Mixture-of-LoRAs technique for unified text, vision, and speech processing.
contrib.zh: 提出Phi-4-Multimodal，采用新颖的LoRA混合技术实现文本、视觉和语音的统一处理。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art ASR performance, ranking first on the OpenASR leaderboard with a compact 5.6B model.
contrib.zh: 在OpenASR排行榜上取得最先进语音识别性能，以紧凑的56亿参数模型排名第一。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong reasoning capabilities in a 3.8B model, matching or surpassing larger models like DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B.
contrib.zh: 在38亿参数模型中展示强大推理能力，匹配或超越DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B等更大模型。

contrib.en: Maintains language performance by freezing the base model and using modality-specific LoRAs, avoiding degradation.
contrib.zh: 通过冻结基础模型并使用模态特定LoRA保持语言性能，避免退化。

contrib.en: Provides extensive evaluations across vision-language, speech, and reasoning benchmarks, outperforming similar-sized models.
contrib.zh: 在视觉语言、语音和推理基准上提供广泛评估，优于类似规模模型。

limits.en: Speech summarization data constitutes only 1% of post-training data, limiting summarization quality.
limits.zh: 语音摘要数据仅占后训练数据的1%，限制了摘要质量。

limits.en: SQQA performance lags behind Gemini-2.0-Flash and GPT-4o due to less general knowledge data.
limits.zh: 由于通用知识数据较少，SQQA性能落后于Gemini-2.0-Flash和GPT-4o。

limits.en: Audio safety datasets are voice-only, lacking non-speech sounds and audio-specific jailbreak training.
limits.zh: 音频安全数据集仅包含语音，缺少非语音声音和音频特定越狱训练。

limits.en: Vision-speech joint training uses synthetic TTS data, which may not fully capture real-world variability.
limits.zh: 视觉-语音联合训练使用合成TTS数据，可能无法完全捕捉真实世界的变异性。

limits.en: Reasoning-enhanced Phi-4-Mini is in preview and not released concurrently with the main models.
limits.zh: 推理增强版Phi-4-Mini处于预览阶段，未与主模型同时发布。

items.en: We introduce Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal, compact yet highly capable language and multimodal models. Phi-4-Mini is a 3.8-billion-parameter language model trained on high-quality web and synthetic data, significantly outperforming recent open-source models of similar size and matching the performance of models twice its size on math and coding tasks requiring complex reasoning. This achievement is driven by a carefully curated synthetic data recipe emphasizing high-quality math and coding datasets. Compared to its predecessor, Phi-3.5-Mini, Phi-4-Mini features an expanded vocabulary size of 200K tokens to better support multilingual applications, as well as group query attention for more efficient long-sequence generation. Phi-4-Multimodal is a multimodal model that integrates text, vision, and speech/audio input modalities into a single model. Its novel modality extension approach leverages LoRA adapters and modality-specific routers to allow multiple inference modes combining various modalities without interference. For example, it now ranks first in the OpenASR leaderboard to date, although the LoRA component of the speech/audio modality has just 460 million parameters. Phi-4-Multimodal supports scenarios involving (vision + language), (vision + speech), and (speech/audio) inputs, outperforming larger vision-language and speech-language models on a wide range of tasks. Additionally, we experiment to further train Phi-4-Mini to enhance its reasoning capabilities.222Please note that reasoning-enhanced Phi-4-Mini is a separate model and currently in a preview stage and will not be released concurrently with Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal.. Despite its compact 3.8-billion-parameter size, this experimental version achieves reasoning performance on par with or surpassing significantly larger models, including DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B.
items.zh: 我们推出了Phi-4-Mini和Phi-4-Multimodal，这是紧凑但功能强大的语言和多模态模型。Phi-4-Mini是一个38亿参数的语言模型，基于高质量的网络和合成数据训练，在需要复杂推理的数学和编码任务上，显著优于近期类似规模的开源模型，并达到其两倍大小模型的性能。这一成就得益于精心策划的合成数据方案，重点强调高质量的数学和编码数据集。与其前身Phi-3.5-Mini相比，Phi-4-Mini扩展了词汇量至20万个词元，以更好地支持多语言应用，并采用分组查询注意力机制以实现更高效的长序列生成。Phi-4-Multimodal是一个多模态模型，将文本、视觉和语音/音频输入模态集成到单一模型中。其新颖的模态扩展方法利用LoRA适配器和模态特定路由器，允许在不干扰的情况下组合多种模态的多种推理模式。例如，它目前在OpenASR排行榜上排名第一，尽管语音/音频模态的LoRA组件仅有4.6亿参数。Phi-4-Multimodal支持涉及（视觉+语言）、（视觉+语音）和（语音/音频）输入的场景，在广泛任务上优于更大的视觉语言和语音语言模型。此外，我们实验性地进一步训练Phi-4-Mini以增强其推理能力。请注意，推理增强版Phi-4-Mini是一个单独的模型，目前处于预览阶段，不会与Phi-4-Mini和Phi-4-Multimodal同时发布。尽管其紧凑的38亿参数规模，这个实验版本在推理性能上达到或超越了显著更大的模型，包括DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B。

items.en: The Phi family of models [AJA+24, AAB+24] have shown that carefully curated and synthesized data enables Small Language Models (SLMs) to achieve highly competitive performance despite having a significantly smaller number of parameters. These models demonstrate comparable results to much larger models. Building on the success of the Phi family of language models, we extend their capabilities to handle additional modalities — such as vision and audio, achieving significant progress akin to private models like GPT [HLG+24], Claude [Ant24], and Gemini [TGL+24].
items.zh: Phi系列模型[AJA+24, AAB+24]表明，精心策划和合成的数据使小型语言模型（SLM）尽管参数数量显著减少，仍能实现极具竞争力的性能。这些模型展现出与更大模型相当的结果。基于Phi系列语言模型的成功，我们将其能力扩展到处理额外模态——如视觉和音频，在类似GPT [HLG+24]、Claude [Ant24]和Gemini [TGL+24]等私有模型方面取得了显著进展。

items.en: In this report, we introduce Phi-4-Multimodal, a unified multimodal SLM that supports multiple inference modes combining various modalities (e.g., text-only, text + image, speech/audio, speech + image) within a single model checkpoint. Phi-4-Multimodal employs a novel “mixture of LoRAs” technique, enabling multimodal capabilities by integrating modality-specific LoRAs while keeping the base language model entirely frozen. Our findings show this technique outperforms existing approaches (e.g., cross-attention designs [ADL+22, AI23]) and achieves comparable performance to fully fine-tuned models on multimodal benchmarks. Additionally, the design of Phi-4-Multimodal is highly extensible, allowing seamless integration of new LoRAs to support additional modalities without impacting existing ones.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了Phi-4-Multimodal，一个统一的多模态SLM，支持在单个模型检查点内组合多种模态（例如，纯文本、文本+图像、语音/音频、语音+图像）的多种推理模式。Phi-4-Multimodal采用新颖的“LoRA混合”技术，通过集成模态特定的LoRA，同时保持基础语言模型完全冻结，从而实现多模态能力。我们的发现表明，该技术优于现有方法（例如，交叉注意力设计[ADL+22, AI23]），并在多模态基准上达到与完全微调模型相当的性能。此外，Phi-4-Multimodal的设计高度可扩展，允许无缝集成新的LoRA以支持额外模态，而不影响现有模态。

items.en: Our training process comprises multiple stages, including language training (encompassing both pre-training and post-training) and then expansion of the language backbone to vision and speech/audio modalities. For the language model, we train Phi-4-Mini using high-quality, reasoning-rich text data. Notably, we include curated, high-quality code datasets to enhance performance on coding tasks. Once the language model training is complete, we freeze the language model and implement our “Mixture of LoRAs” technique to proceed with the multimodal training stage. Specifically, we train two additional LoRA modules alongside modality-specific encoders and projectors to enable vision-related tasks (e.g., vision-language and vision-speech) and speech/audio-related tasks (e.g., speech-language). Both of them contain pretraining and post-training stages for modality alignment and instruction finetuning, respectively.
items.zh: 我们的训练过程包括多个阶段，包括语言训练（涵盖预训练和后训练），然后将语言骨干扩展到视觉和语音/音频模态。对于语言模型，我们使用高质量、富含推理的文本数据训练Phi-4-Mini。值得注意的是，我们包含了精心策划的高质量代码数据集，以增强编码任务的性能。语言模型训练完成后，我们冻结语言模型并实施我们的“LoRA混合”技术，以进行多模态训练阶段。具体来说，我们训练两个额外的LoRA模块，以及模态特定的编码器和投影器，以实现视觉相关任务（例如，视觉语言和视觉语音）和语音/音频相关任务（例如，语音语言）。两者都包含预训练和后训练阶段，分别用于模态对齐和指令微调。

items.en: We also explore the reasoning potential of Phi-4-Mini to create a compact yet powerful model that rivals substantially larger state-of-the-art reasoning systems, such as DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B [GYZ+25].
items.zh: 我们还探索了Phi-4-Mini的推理潜力，以创建一个紧凑但强大的模型，与显著更大的最先进推理系统（如DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B [GYZ+25]）相抗衡。

items.en: The key contributions of this model are listed below.
items.zh: 该模型的主要贡献如下。

items.en: Unified Multi-Modality Support: In contrast to existing methods [Tea25b, CWW+24] that employ separate models for different modalities, Phi-4-Multimodal is designed as a unified model capable of efficiently handling multiple modality scenarios. By leveraging the Mixture of LoRAs [HSW+22], Phi-4-Multimodal extends multimodal capabilities while minimizing interference between modalities. This approach enables seamless integration and ensures consistent performance across tasks involving text, images, and speech/audio.
items.zh: 统一的多模态支持：与现有方法[Tea25b, CWW+24]采用不同模态的单独模型不同，Phi-4-Multimodal被设计为一个统一模型，能够高效处理多种模态场景。通过利用LoRA混合[HSW+22]，Phi-4-Multimodal扩展了多模态能力，同时最小化模态之间的干扰。这种方法实现了无缝集成，并确保在涉及文本、图像和语音/音频的任务上性能一致。

items.en: Remarkable Language Performance for the size: The language models achieve state-of-the-art performance in natural language understanding and generation for its size category. It demonstrates exceptional reasoning and mathematical capabilities, making it well-suited for complex problem-solving and knowledge-based tasks.
items.zh: 卓越的语言性能（按规模）：语言模型在其规模类别中实现了自然语言理解和生成的最先进性能。它展示了卓越的推理和数学能力，非常适合复杂问题解决和基于知识的任务。

items.en: Outstanding Code Understanding and Generation for the size: The language models achieve state-of-the-art performance on code-related tasks within its size category. The model excels at tasks such as code synthesis, debugging, and documentation generation, empowering developers and aiding in software engineering workflows.
items.zh: 出色的代码理解与生成（按规模）：语言模型在其规模类别中实现了代码相关任务的最先进性能。该模型在代码合成、调试和文档生成等任务上表现出色，赋能开发者并辅助软件工程工作流程。

items.en: Superior Multi-Modal Capabilities for the size: The model delivers state-of-the-art performance across multi-modal tasks for its size category, demonstrating robust integration of diverse data types. This includes tasks that involve combining images with text and speech modalities, enabling multi-modal reasoning.
items.zh: 卓越的多模态能力（按规模）：该模型在其规模类别中跨多模态任务提供了最先进性能，展示了不同数据类型的稳健集成。这包括涉及图像与文本和语音模态组合的任务，实现多模态推理。

items.en: Exceptional Speech and Audio Performance: The model achieves strong performance especially on multilingual speech recognition and translation tasks, and is the first open-sourced model with speech summarization capability.
items.zh: 卓越的语音和音频性能：该模型在多语言语音识别和翻译任务上取得了强劲性能，并且是首个具备语音摘要能力的开源模型。

items.en: Enhanced Reasoning Capabilities: The reasoning-optimized version of Phi-4-Mini demonstrates superior reasoning abilities for a model in its size category.
items.zh: 增强的推理能力：Phi-4-Mini的推理优化版本在其规模类别中展示了卓越的推理能力。

items.en: The Phi-4-Mini series comprises two state-of-the-art small models: a language model (Phi-4-Mini) and a multimodal model (Phi-4-Multimodal) that integrates language, vision, and speech/audio modalities. All Phi-4-Mini models use the tokenizer o200k​_​base\text{o200k}\_\text{base} tiktoken 333https://github.com/openai/tiktoken with a vocabulary size of 200,064 intended to support multilingual and multimodal input and output more efficiently. All models are based on decoder-only Transformer [VSP+17] and support 128K context length based on LongRoPE [DZZ+24a].
items.zh: Phi-4-Mini系列包括两个最先进的小型模型：一个语言模型（Phi-4-Mini）和一个集成语言、视觉和语音/音频模态的多模态模型（Phi-4-Multimodal）。所有Phi-4-Mini模型使用词元化器o200k_base tiktoken，词汇量为200,064，旨在更高效地支持多语言和多模态输入输出。所有模型基于仅解码器Transformer [VSP+17]，并基于LongRoPE [DZZ+24a]支持128K上下文长度。

items.en: Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal share the same language model backbone. Phi-4-Mini consist of 32 Transformer layers with hidden state size of 3,072 and tied input / output embedding which reduces the memory consumption significantly while providing much wider coverage of vocabularies compared Phi-3.5. Each Transformer block includes an attention mechanism based on Group Query Attention (GQA) [ALTdJ+23], which optimizes key and value memory (KV cache) usage for long-context generation. Specifically, the model employs 24 query heads and 8 key/value heads, reducing KV cache consumption to one-third of its standard size. Additionally, in the RoPE configuration [SAL+24], a fractional RoPE dimension is used, ensuring that 25% of the attention head dimension remains position-agnostic. This design supports smoother handling of longer contexts. To determine the peak learning rate, we follow [BBC+24] with L​R∗​(D)=B​D−0.32LR^{*}(D)=BD^{-0.32} where BB is a constant we tune for this specific model and DD is the total number of training tokens. We fit BB by tuning across D=12.5​B,25​B,37.5​B,50​BD=12.5B,25B,37.5B,50B.
items.zh: Phi-4-Mini和Phi-4-Multimodal共享相同的语言模型骨干。Phi-4-Mini由32个Transformer层组成，隐藏状态大小为3,072，并采用绑定的输入/输出嵌入，这显著减少了内存消耗，同时与Phi-3.5相比提供了更广泛的词汇覆盖。每个Transformer块包括基于分组查询注意力（GQA）[ALTdJ+23]的注意力机制，优化了长上下文生成中的键值内存（KV缓存）使用。具体来说，该模型使用24个查询头和8个键/值头，将KV缓存消耗减少到标准大小的三分之一。此外，在RoPE配置[SAL+24]中，使用了分数RoPE维度，确保25%的注意力头维度与位置无关。这种设计支持更平滑地处理更长上下文。为了确定峰值学习率，我们遵循[BBC+24]的方法，使用LR*(D)=BD^{-0.32}，其中B是我们为该特定模型调整的常数，D是训练词元总数。我们通过调整D=12.5B, 25B, 37.5B, 50B来拟合B。

items.en: To integrate vision as an input modality, numerous vision-language models have been developed, including the LLava series [LLWL24, LLL+24, LZG+24], QWenVL series [BBY+23, WBT+24], InternVL series [CWT+24, CWW+24, CWC+24], InternLM-XComposer series [ZDW+23, DZZ+24b], Molmo [DCL+24], and NVLM [DLW+24]. Similarly, for audio input, notable contributions include Qwen2-Audio [CXY+24], InternLM-XComposer2.5-Omnilive [ZDC+24], InternOmni, Mini-Omni [XW24], and GLM4-Voice [ZDL+24].
items.zh: 为了将视觉作为输入模态集成，已经开发了许多视觉语言模型，包括LLava系列[LLWL24, LLL+24, LZG+24]、QWenVL系列[BBY+23, WBT+24]、InternVL系列[CWT+24, CWW+24, CWC+24]、InternLM-XComposer系列[ZDW+23, DZZ+24b]、Molmo [DCL+24]和NVLM [DLW+24]。类似地，对于音频输入，值得注意的贡献包括Qwen2-Audio [CXY+24]、InternLM-XComposer2.5-Omnilive [ZDC+24]、InternOmni、Mini-Omni [XW24]和GLM4-Voice [ZDL+24]。

items.en: However, in order to enable modality-specific functionality, these multimodal models generally require fine-tuning the base language model, which often diminishes its original language capabilities. Consequently, supporting diverse input signals without compromising quality necessitates deploying multiple models—a particularly challenging limitation for resource-constrained devices. To address this, LLama-Vision [DJP+24] adopts a strategy inspired by Flamingo [ADL+22], adding extra cross-attention layers while preserving the core language model. However, this approach will result in reduced performance on vision-language benchmarks compared to fully fine-tuned models. To fill the performance gap, NVLM [DLW+24] further explores a hybrid framework, employing joint supervised fine-tuning with high-quality text SFT data. Yet, this approach only examines limited language benchmarks and does not address additional training stages often required after SFT.
items.zh: 然而，为了启用模态特定功能，这些多模态模型通常需要微调基础语言模型，这往往会削弱其原始语言能力。因此，在不牺牲质量的情况下支持多样化的输入信号需要部署多个模型——这对于资源受限的设备来说是一个特别具有挑战性的限制。为了解决这个问题，LLama-Vision [DJP+24]采用了一种受Flamingo [ADL+22]启发的策略，在保留核心语言模型的同时添加额外的交叉注意力层。然而，这种方法在视觉语言基准上的性能会低于完全微调的模型。为了弥补性能差距，NVLM [DLW+24]进一步探索了一种混合框架，使用高质量文本SFT数据进行联合监督微调。然而，这种方法仅检查了有限的语言基准，并未解决SFT后通常需要的额外训练阶段。

items.capEn: Figure 1: A overview of the Multimodal architecture for Phi-4-Multimodal

items.en: We adopt the mixture of LoRAs design for our Phi-4-Multimodal architecture to support variant multi-modality use cases. Different LoRAs are trained to handle interactions between different modalities. Our Phi-4-Multimodal supports a vast range of tasks, including single/multiple images QA/summarization, video QA/summarization, vision-speech tasks, speech QA/summarization/translation/recognition, and audio understanding, while maintains the original language model performance.
items.zh: 我们采用LoRA混合设计用于Phi-4-Multimodal架构，以支持多种多模态用例。不同的LoRA被训练来处理不同模态之间的交互。我们的Phi-4-Multimodal支持广泛的任务，包括单/多图像问答/摘要、视频问答/摘要、视觉语音任务、语音问答/摘要/翻译/识别以及音频理解，同时保持原始语言模型性能。

items.en: The vision modality is implemented with an image encoder, a projector to align the vision and text embeddings and a LoRA adaptor. The vision encoder is based on SigLIP-400M that is finetuned with LLM2CLIP [HWY+24] on large scale image-text pairs with resolution 448×448448\times 448 . The projector is a 2-layer MLP that maps the vision features dimension to the text embedding dimension. Extra LoRA is added on all the linear layers in the language decoder and only deployed in the supervised fine tuning (SFT) stage. The image encoder and projector introduce 440M model parameters while the vision adapter L​o​R​AVLoRA_{V} consumes another 370M model parameters.
items.zh: 视觉模态通过图像编码器、投影器（用于对齐视觉和文本嵌入）以及LoRA适配器实现。视觉编码器基于SigLIP-400M，使用LLM2CLIP [HWY+24]在大规模图像-文本对上进行微调，分辨率为448×448。投影器是一个2层MLP，将视觉特征维度映射到文本嵌入维度。额外的LoRA被添加到语言解码器的所有线性层，并仅在监督微调（SFT）阶段部署。图像编码器和投影器引入了4.4亿模型参数，而视觉适配器LoRA_V消耗了另外3.7亿模型参数。

items.en: In order to enable the model to process images with diverse resolution effectively and efficiently, we proposed a new dynamic multi-crop strategy. Specifically, given a target image, we first compute the crop number for each side by dividing the original size by the crop-size, i.e. ⌈HC⌉×⌈WC⌉\lceil\frac{H}{C}\rceil\times\lceil\frac{W}{C}\rceil, where H,W,CH,W,C are the image height, width and crop size respectively. If the total crop number is within the maximum number, i.e., 1616 in the pretraining stage and 3636 in SFT, we just slightly resize the image to let it fit the size given by the computed image crops. Otherwise, we will leverage the strategy proposed in InternVL2 [CWW+24] that find the crop number by matching the best aspect ratio. Compared to InternVL2, the key benefits of our strategy is to avoid resizing one small image (e.g., 28×44828\times 448) to unreasonable large size when looking for the closest image aspect ratio.
items.zh: 为了有效且高效地处理不同分辨率的图像，我们提出了一种新的动态多裁剪策略。具体来说，给定目标图像，我们首先通过将原始尺寸除以裁剪尺寸来计算每边的裁剪数量，即⌈H/C⌉×⌈W/C⌉，其中H、W、C分别是图像高度、宽度和裁剪尺寸。如果总裁剪数量在最大数量内，即预训练阶段为16，SFT阶段为36，我们只需轻微调整图像大小以使其适应计算出的图像裁剪尺寸。否则，我们将利用InternVL2 [CWW+24]中提出的策略，通过匹配最佳宽高比来找到裁剪数量。与InternVL2相比，我们策略的关键优势在于避免在寻找最接近图像宽高比时将小图像（例如28×448）调整到不合理的大尺寸。

items.en: The speech/audio inputs we used are 80-dim log-Mel filter-bank features with the frame rate of 10ms. To enable Phi-4-Multimodal speech and audio functions, we connect a pre-trained audio encoder and Phi-4-Mini through an audio adapter. In addition, LoRA is applied on the language decoder to improve the performance of speech/audio benchmarks while preserving the text capability. The introduced modules for the speech/audio modality include:
items.zh: 我们使用的语音/音频输入是80维对数梅尔滤波器组特征，帧率为10毫秒。为了实现Phi-4-Multimodal的语音和音频功能，我们通过一个音频适配器将预训练的音频编码器与Phi-4-Mini连接起来。此外，在语言解码器上应用了LoRA，以提高语音/音频基准的性能，同时保留文本能力。为语音/音频模态引入的模块包括：

items.en: An audio encoder, which consists 3 convolutions layers and 24 conformer blocks [GQC+20] with 1024 attention dimensions, 1536 feed-forward dimensions, and 16 attention heads. The convolution layers contribute to a sub-sampling rate of 8, and thus 80ms token rate for the language decoder.
items.zh: 一个音频编码器，由3个卷积层和24个Conformer块组成，注意力维度为1024，前馈维度为1536，注意力头数为16。卷积层贡献了8倍的子采样率，因此语言解码器的词元率为80毫秒。

items.en: An audio projector, which is a 2-layer MLP that maps the 1024-dim speech features to the text embedding space of 3072 dimensions, similar to the vision projector.
items.zh: 一个音频投影器，它是一个2层MLP，将1024维的语音特征映射到3072维的文本嵌入空间，类似于视觉投影器。

items.en: L​o​R​AALoRA_{A} that has been applied to all attention and MLP layers in Phi-4-Mini with a rank of 320.
items.zh: L​o​R​A_A，已应用于Phi-4-Mini中的所有注意力和MLP层，秩为320。

items.en: The audio encoder and projector introduce 460M parameters while L​o​R​AALoRA_{A} consumes another 460M parameters. Note that the speech token rate is 80ms, indicating 750 tokens for 1-minute audio.
items.zh: 音频编码器和投影器引入了4.6亿参数，而L​o​R​A_A又消耗了4.6亿参数。注意，语音词元率为80毫秒，意味着1分钟音频对应750个词元。

items.en: The multimodal training stages include vision training, speech/audio training and vision-speech joint training.
items.zh: 多模态训练阶段包括视觉训练、语音/音频训练以及视觉-语音联合训练。

items.en: The overall training pipeline for multimodal learning consists of vision training, speech and audio training, and joint vision-audio training. Vision training follows a four-stage process: 1) Projector Alignment stage: initially, only the projector is trained using caption data to align vision and text embeddings while preserving the pretrained representation of the vision encoder. 2) Joint Vision Training stage: Next, the projector and vision encoder are jointly trained on the full vision pretraining dataset to enhance key vision capabilities, such as OCR and dense understanding. 3) Generative Vision-Language Training stage: LoRA is then deployed on the language decoder and trained alongside the vision encoder and projector using curated single-frame SFT data, equipping the model with generative capabilities for vision-language inputs. 4) Multi-Frame Training stage: Finally, the model is trained on multi-frame SFT data with the vision encoder frozen, extending the context length coverage to 64k and enabling multi-image and temporal understanding.
items.zh: 多模态学习的整体训练流程包括视觉训练、语音和音频训练，以及视觉-音频联合训练。视觉训练遵循四个阶段：1) 投影器对齐阶段：首先，仅使用描述数据训练投影器，以对齐视觉和文本嵌入，同时保留视觉编码器的预训练表示。2) 联合视觉训练阶段：接下来，投影器和视觉编码器在完整的视觉预训练数据集上联合训练，以增强关键视觉能力，如OCR和密集理解。3) 生成式视觉-语言训练阶段：然后，在语言解码器上部署LoRA，并与视觉编码器和投影器一起使用精心策划的单帧SFT数据进行训练，使模型具备视觉-语言输入的生成能力。4) 多帧训练阶段：最后，在冻结视觉编码器的情况下，使用多帧SFT数据训练模型，将上下文长度覆盖范围扩展到64k，并实现多图像和时间理解。

items.en: With the Phi-4-Mini language model, we conduct a two-stage paradigm for speech and audio training, also known as speech/audio pre-training and post-training. In the pre-training stage, we use large-scale automatic speech recognition (ASR) data to align the audio encoder and Phi-4-Mini in the semantic space. In this stage, the encoder and projector is updated with a learning rate of 4e-5 for 50k steps while the language decoder is frozen. We initialize the audio encoder with a pre-trained encoder from the attention-based encoder decoder (AED) ASR model.
items.zh: 使用Phi-4-Mini语言模型，我们采用两阶段范式进行语音和音频训练，也称为语音/音频预训练和后训练。在预训练阶段，我们使用大规模自动语音识别（ASR）数据将音频编码器和Phi-4-Mini在语义空间中对齐。在此阶段，编码器和投影器以4e-5的学习率更新50k步，而语言解码器被冻结。我们使用来自基于注意力的编码器-解码器（AED）ASR模型的预训练编码器来初始化音频编码器。

items.en: After the pre-training stage, the model can only perform the ASR task. To unlock the instruction following capability of Phi-4-Multimodal for variety of speech and audio tasks, we continue to train the model with about 100M curated speech and audio SFT samples (after weighted up) as the speech post-training stage. Please refer to Section 3.4.2 for data details. In speech/audio post-training, the audio encoder is frozen. We update the audio projector and L​o​R​AALoRA_{A} with a learning rate of 1e-4 for another 50k steps. We consider different maximum audio lengths for different tasks in post-training. For speech summarization task, we train up to 30-minute audio (22.5k tokens). For other tasks, the maximum audio exposed in training is 30s (375 tokens). If we consider the 128k context length for language decoder, theoretically Phi-4-Multimodal can support a maximum 2.8 hours of audio as out of the box inference. It is worth noting that we have not fine tuned the model on such long audio data and it may need further fine tuning to practically support such use cases.
items.zh: 预训练阶段后，模型只能执行ASR任务。为了解锁Phi-4-Multimodal在各种语音和音频任务中的指令跟随能力，我们继续使用约1亿个精心策划的语音和音频SFT样本（加权后）训练模型，作为语音后训练阶段。数据详情请参见第3.4.2节。在语音/音频后训练中，音频编码器被冻结。我们以1e-4的学习率更新音频投影器和L​o​R​A_A，再训练50k步。我们针对不同任务在后训练中考虑不同的最大音频长度。对于语音摘要任务，我们训练长达30分钟的音频（22.5k个词元）。对于其他任务，训练中暴露的最大音频为30秒（375个词元）。如果考虑语言解码器的128k上下文长度，理论上Phi-4-Multimodal可以支持最长2.8小时的音频作为开箱即用的推理。值得注意的是，我们尚未在此类长音频数据上微调模型，可能需要进一步微调才能实际支持此类用例。

items.en: The vision-speech joint training is conducted after vision post-training and speech post-training. We freeze the language base model, audio encoder, and audio projector, while finetuning the vision adapter L​o​R​AVLoRA_{V}, vision encoder, and the vision projector. In this stage, we train the model mainly on vision-speech SFT data but we also include a mixture of language and vision post-training data to maintain the corresponding performance.
items.zh: 视觉-语音联合训练在视觉后训练和语音后训练之后进行。我们冻结语言基础模型、音频编码器和音频投影器，同时微调视觉适配器L​o​R​A_V、视觉编码器和视觉投影器。在此阶段，我们主要使用视觉-语音SFT数据训练模型，但也混合了语言和视觉后训练数据以保持相应性能。

items.en: Recent studies have suggested that training a robust reasoning model only requires a small amount of high-quality data, such as LIMO [YHX+25] and S1K [MYS+25]. However, we propose a fundamentally different training paradigm for SLM: we need to conduct a pre-training phase on extensive reasoning data to capture general reasoning chains, and then perform careful fine-tuning on curated SFT or preference data. The continued training of Phi-4-Mini for reasoning proceeds in three distinct stages. 1) First, building on Phi-4-Mini, the model is pre-trained on approximately 60 billion reasoning CoT tokens generated by frontier reasoning LLMs, after which rejection sampling is employed to filter out incorrect outputs. This allows the reasoning extension of Phi-4-Mini to learn the reasoning chains produced by these models. 2) In the second stage, the model is fine-tuned on a smaller but carefully curated dataset of around 200K high-quality CoT samples, chosen to cover diverse domains and varying difficulty levels. 3) Roll-Out DPO: finally, in the third stage, we label filtered incorrect outputs as “dis-preferred” and their corrected counterparts as ‘preferred’, compiling a new dataset of 300K preference samples for DPO training.
items.zh: 最近的研究表明，训练一个稳健的推理模型只需要少量高质量数据，例如LIMO和S1K。然而，我们为SLM提出了一种根本不同的训练范式：我们需要在大量推理数据上进行预训练阶段以捕获通用推理链，然后在精心策划的SFT或偏好数据上进行仔细微调。Phi-4-Mini的推理持续训练分三个不同阶段进行。1) 首先，在Phi-4-Mini的基础上，模型在约600亿个由前沿推理LLM生成的推理思维链词元上进行预训练，之后使用拒绝采样过滤掉错误输出。这使得Phi-4-Mini的推理扩展能够学习这些模型产生的推理链。2) 在第二阶段，模型在一个较小但精心策划的数据集上进行微调，该数据集包含约20万个高质量思维链样本，涵盖不同领域和难度级别。3) Roll-Out DPO：最后，在第三阶段，我们将过滤后的错误输出标记为“非偏好”，将其纠正后的对应项标记为“偏好”，编译了一个包含30万个偏好样本的新数据集用于DPO训练。

items.en: Compared with Phi-3.5-Mini, we improved the quality of the pre-training data from several key aspects:
items.zh: 与Phi-3.5-Mini相比，我们从几个关键方面提高了预训练数据的质量：

items.en: Better data filtering: By using an enhanced quality classifier, which is trained on a larger curated dataset consisting of cleaner positive and negative samples, we end up with better filtering quality across multiple languages with various aspects (e.g. toxic, obscure, scientific, etc.), leading to a more comprehensive and controllable filtering strategy overall.
items.zh: 更好的数据过滤：通过使用增强的质量分类器，该分类器在更大的精心策划数据集上训练，包含更干净的正负样本，我们在多个语言和不同方面（如有毒、晦涩、科学等）获得了更好的过滤质量，从而整体上实现了更全面和可控的过滤策略。

items.en: Better math and coding data: For the math and coding data, we have augmented our original data with a specific instruction-based math and coding data set. This enhancement has resulted in effective results in math, coding and reasoning.
items.zh: 更好的数学和编码数据：对于数学和编码数据，我们使用特定的基于指令的数学和编码数据集增强了原始数据。这一增强在数学、编码和推理方面取得了有效结果。

items.en: Better synthetic data: we incorporated Phi-4 synthetic data [AAB+24] into this model training with the same processing and decontamination.
items.zh: 更好的合成数据：我们将Phi-4合成数据纳入此模型训练，并采用相同的处理和去污染方法。

items.en: Better data mixture: With the better classifiers, we re-tuned the data mixture with ablation experiments. Especially we increased the ratio for the reasoning data. That gives us a boost for the model quality.
items.zh: 更好的数据混合：借助更好的分类器，我们通过消融实验重新调整了数据混合。特别是我们增加了推理数据的比例。这提升了模型质量。

items.en: With these techniques, we built the 5 trillion pre-training data corpus, which is larger and in higher quality compared to the Phi-3.5-Mini.
items.zh: 通过这些技术，我们构建了5万亿的预训练数据语料库，与Phi-3.5-Mini相比，规模更大且质量更高。

items.en: Compared to Phi-3.5-Mini, Phi-4-Mini includes a significantly larger and more diverse set of function calling and summarization data. Additionally, we synthesize a substantial amount of instruction-following data to enhance the model’s instruction-following capabilities. For coding, we incorporate extensive code completion data, including tasks that require the model to generate missing code in the middle of an existing code snippet. This challenges the model to understand both the requirements and the existing context, leading to significant performance improvements.
items.zh: 与Phi-3.5-Mini相比，Phi-4-Mini包含了显著更大且更多样化的函数调用和摘要数据。此外，我们合成了大量指令跟随数据以增强模型的指令跟随能力。对于编码，我们纳入了广泛的代码补全数据，包括要求模型在现有代码片段中间生成缺失代码的任务。这挑战了模型理解需求和现有上下文的能力，从而带来了显著的性能提升。

items.en: We generate a large volume of synthetic chain-of-thought (CoT) data from larger reasoning models, covering diverse domains and difficulty levels. During sampling, we employ both rule-based and model-based rejection methods to discard incorrect generations and feed them back for resampling. Also, we label correct sampled answers as preferred generations and incorrect ones as dis-preferred, and create the DPO data. This data has been utilized exclusively for the experimental reasoning model and has not been applied to the officially released checkpoint Phi-4-Mini.
items.zh: 我们从更大的推理模型生成了大量合成思维链数据，涵盖不同领域和难度级别。在采样过程中，我们采用基于规则和基于模型的拒绝方法来丢弃错误生成并将其反馈以重新采样。此外，我们将正确的采样答案标记为偏好生成，错误的标记为非偏好，并创建DPO数据。这些数据仅用于实验性推理模型，并未应用于官方发布的检查点Phi-4-Mini。

items.en: The Phi-4-Multimodal model’s pre-training phase involves a rich and varied dataset, encompassing interleaved image-text documents, image-text pairs, image grounding data, synthetic datasets from OCR of PDFs and realistic images, and synthesized datasets for chart comprehension. During this phase, the model’s primary focus is on predicting the next token, concentrating solely on text tokens and disregarding any loss associated with image tokens. The pre-training process involves a total of 0.5T tokens, combining both visual and textual elements. Additionally, the maximum image resolution is capped at 1344x1344, as most training images are smaller than this size. For supervised fine-tuning (SFT), we utilized a combination of a text SFT dataset, publicly available multimodal instruction tuning datasets, and large-scale in-house multimodal instruction tuning datasets that we developed. These datasets span diverse domains and tasks, including general natural image understanding, chart, table, and diagram comprehension and reasoning, PowerPoint analysis, OCR, multi-image comparison, video summarization, and model safety. Collectively, the multimodal SFT data comprises approximately 0.3T tokens.
items.zh: Phi-4-Multimodal模型的预训练阶段涉及丰富多样的数据集，包括交错的图像-文本文档、图像-文本对、图像定位数据、来自PDF和真实图像OCR的合成数据集，以及用于图表理解的合成数据集。在此阶段，模型的主要焦点是预测下一个词元，仅关注文本词元，忽略与图像词元相关的任何损失。预训练过程总共涉及0.5T词元，结合了视觉和文本元素。此外，最大图像分辨率限制为1344x1344，因为大多数训练图像小于此尺寸。对于监督微调（SFT），我们使用了文本SFT数据集、公开可用的多模态指令微调数据集以及我们开发的大规模内部多模态指令微调数据集的组合。这些数据集涵盖不同领域和任务，包括通用自然图像理解、图表、表格和图示理解与推理、PowerPoint分析、OCR、多图像比较、视频摘要和模型安全性。总体而言，多模态SFT数据包含约0.3T词元。

items.en: For vision-speech data, Phi-4-Multimodal model is trained on a diverse set of synthetic vision-speech data, covering single-frame and multi-frame scenarios. Specifically, we reuse a subset of vision-language SFT data and run in-house text-to-speech (TTS) engine to convert the user queries from texts to audios. This subset is carefully selected to avoid certain datasets where the queries are not suitable to read out in speech. We also measure the quality of the synthetic speech by transcribing the audio with in-house ASR model and calculating the word error rate (WER) between original text and transcription. Our final vision-speech data is generated with the WER-based filtering to ensure the quality.
items.zh: 对于视觉-语音数据，Phi-4-Multimodal 模型在多样化的合成视觉-语音数据集上训练，涵盖单帧和多帧场景。具体来说，我们复用了视觉-语言 SFT 数据的一个子集，并运行内部文本转语音（TTS）引擎，将用户查询从文本转换为音频。该子集经过精心挑选，以避免某些查询不适合语音朗读的数据集。我们还通过内部 ASR 模型转录音频并计算原始文本与转录之间的词错误率（WER）来衡量合成语音的质量。最终的视觉-语音数据基于 WER 过滤生成，以确保质量。

items.en: The training data for speech/audio functions can be categorized into two types: 1) pre-training data with ASR transcriptions to provide a strong alignment between the speech and text modalities; 2) post-training data to unlock the instruction-following capability of Phi-4-Multimodal with the speech/audio modality involved. The post-training data covers a variety of tasks, including automatic speech recognition (ASR), automatic speech translation (AST), speech question answering (SQA), spoken query question answering (SQQA), speech summarization (SSUM), and audio understanding (AU).
items.zh: 语音/音频功能的训练数据可分为两类：1) 预训练数据，包含 ASR 转录，以提供语音和文本模态之间的强对齐；2) 后训练数据，用于解锁 Phi-4-Multimodal 在涉及语音/音频模态时的指令跟随能力。后训练数据涵盖多种任务，包括自动语音识别（ASR）、自动语音翻译（AST）、语音问答（SQA）、口语查询问答（SQQA）、语音摘要（SSUM）和音频理解（AU）。

items.en: Despite that the audio encoder is initialized from a well-trained ASR model as mentioned in Sec. 2.2, the speech and text latent spaces differ. To pre-train the adapter and reduce the modality gap between the speech and text sequences, we curate a dataset of approximately 2M hours of anonymized in-house speech-text pairs with strong/weak ASR supervisions, covering the eight supported languages 444The speech interface supports the following 8 languages: Chinese, English, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese, and Spanish..
items.zh: 尽管音频编码器如第 2.2 节所述从训练良好的 ASR 模型初始化，但语音和文本潜在空间存在差异。为了预训练适配器并减少语音和文本序列之间的模态差距，我们整理了一个约 200 万小时的匿名内部语音-文本对数据集，包含强/弱 ASR 监督，涵盖八种支持语言。

items.en: Following language post-training paradigm, we curate SFT data for speech/audio post-training, aiming for unlocking the instruction-following capability with speech/audio as query or context. We use both the real and synthetic speech/audio data during speech post-training, covering the majority of speech and audio understanding tasks. All the SFT data are formatted as:
items.zh: 遵循语言后训练范式，我们为语音/音频后训练整理了 SFT 数据，旨在解锁以语音/音频作为查询或上下文的指令跟随能力。我们在语音后训练中使用真实和合成的语音/音频数据，涵盖大多数语音和音频理解任务。所有 SFT 数据格式化为：

items.en: <|user|><audio>{task prompt}<|end|><|assistant|>{label}<|end|><|user|><audio>\{\text{task prompt\}}<|end|><|assistant|>\{\text{label}\}<|end|> where task prompt is to describe each task in the natural language description and it is null for the SQQA task.
items.zh: <|user|><audio>{任务提示}<|end|><|assistant|>{标签}<|end|> 其中任务提示用自然语言描述每个任务，对于 SQQA 任务则为空。

items.en: ASR training data contains about 20k hours anonymized in-house, and 20k hours selected public transcribed speech recordings that span eight languages. The weighted ASR training data contributes to 28M SFT examples.
items.zh: ASR 训练数据包含约 2 万小时匿名内部数据，以及 2 万小时精选的公开转录语音记录，涵盖八种语言。加权后的 ASR 训练数据贡献了 2800 万个 SFT 样本。

items.en: AST training data contains about 30K hours of anonymized in-house and public speech data with translations in two directions: from 7 languages to English and from English to 7 languages. This data contains both supervised and synthetic translation from a machine translation model. The AST data is created with two formats: direct ST and ASR + translation in a Chain-of-thoughts (CoT) manner, contributing to 28M weighted training examples in post-training.
items.zh: AST 训练数据包含约 3 万小时匿名内部和公开语音数据，带有双向翻译：从 7 种语言到英语以及从英语到 7 种语言。这些数据包含来自机器翻译模型的监督和合成翻译。AST 数据以两种格式创建：直接 ST 和 ASR + 思维链（CoT）方式的翻译，在后训练中贡献了 2800 万个加权训练样本。

items.en: SQA and SQQA training data contain synthetic QA pairs from real speech and synthetic audio from text SFT data.
items.zh: SQA 和 SQQA 训练数据包含来自真实语音的合成 QA 对以及来自文本 SFT 数据的合成音频。

items.en: Synthetic QA pairs for SQA: To enable SQA capability, we reuse the speech-transcript pairs in the ASR training data and prompt the language model to generate multiple text QA pairs for each transcript. The low-quality QA pairs are filtered during training.
items.zh: SQA 的合成 QA 对：为了实现 SQA 能力，我们复用 ASR 训练数据中的语音-文本对，并提示语言模型为每个转录生成多个文本 QA 对。低质量的 QA 对在训练过程中被过滤掉。

items.en: Synthetic spoken query (audio) for SQQA: SQA is tasked to respond speech context plus text query. Responding to spoken query directly is also an important capability for Phi-4-Multimodal. Consequently, We sample from the language post-training data and convert the text query to audio query using our internal zero-shot TTS system.
items.zh: SQQA 的合成口语查询（音频）：SQA 的任务是响应语音上下文加文本查询。直接响应口语查询也是 Phi-4-Multimodal 的重要能力。因此，我们从语言后训练数据中采样，并使用内部零样本 TTS 系统将文本查询转换为音频查询。

items.en: Synthetic LM response for SQQA: Similar to [FWL+24], we synthetically generate responses for speech prompts by prompting the language model with the ASR transcripts of those prompts. The LM response data can improve the SQQA robustness of Phi-4-Multimodal in real scenarios because of more diverse spoken queries sampled from the ASR training data.
items.zh: SQQA 的合成 LM 响应：类似于 [FWL+24]，我们通过使用这些提示的 ASR 转录提示语言模型，为语音提示合成生成响应。LM 响应数据可以提高 Phi-4-Multimodal 在真实场景中的 SQQA 鲁棒性，因为从 ASR 训练数据中采样了更多样化的口语查询。

items.en: The total SQA and SQAQA data contribute to 26M weighted SFT examples.
items.zh: SQA 和 SQQA 数据总计贡献了 2600 万个加权 SFT 样本。

items.en: The summarization training data is assembled from anonymized audio recordings paired with their transcripts. The audio consists of multi-speaker conversational speech that spans a range of topics. Rather than dividing the audio into shorter segments, we maintain its full length up to a maximum of 30 minutes. To construct query-summary pairs for each audio clip, we use GPT-4 to generate a variety of queries and their respective summaries based on the transcripts. For each audio clip, the summarization queries address specific or general aspects of the conversation and vary in format, including length (number of words or sentences) and structure (summaries formatted as bullet points, JSON, or email). The weighted dataset contributes to 1M SFT examples with English speech only.
items.zh: 摘要训练数据由匿名音频记录及其转录组成。音频包含多说话人对话语音，涵盖多种主题。我们不将音频分割成较短的片段，而是保持其完整长度，最长可达 30 分钟。为了为每个音频片段构建查询-摘要对，我们使用 GPT-4 基于转录生成各种查询及其相应的摘要。对于每个音频片段，摘要查询涉及对话的特定或一般方面，并在格式上有所不同，包括长度（单词或句子数量）和结构（摘要格式化为项目符号、JSON 或电子邮件）。加权数据集贡献了 100 万个仅英语语音的 SFT 样本。

items.en: The audio understanding data contributes to around 17M weighted SFT examples sourced from public. The dataset is created in the form of (audio, question, answer) tuples, where “audio” contains speech, audio, and music inputs. Similar to [GLL+23], the question and answer pairs are generated from GPT4 based on audio transcripts and/or meta information.
items.zh: 音频理解数据贡献了约 1700 万个来自公开来源的加权 SFT 样本。数据集以（音频、问题、答案）三元组的形式创建，其中“音频”包含语音、音频和音乐输入。类似于 [GLL+23]，问题和答案对基于音频转录和/或元信息由 GPT4 生成。

items.en: In addition the task-specific data, we also include audio safety data in speech/audio post-training. Please refer to Sec. 5.2 for the details of audio safety data. For all the public data, we utilize our Azure PII Detector555https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/language-service/personally-identifiable-information/overview to identify and handle Personally Identifiable Information (PII). The training examples with PII detected are removed for privacy concerns.
items.zh: 除了任务特定数据外，我们还在语音/音频后训练中包含了音频安全数据。关于音频安全数据的详细信息，请参阅第 5.2 节。对于所有公开数据，我们使用 Azure PII 检测器来识别和处理个人身份信息（PII）。检测到 PII 的训练样本出于隐私考虑被移除。
