items.en: We report in Table 1 the evaluation results of Phi-4-Multimodal on 13 open-source academic single-image vision-language benchmarks, 2 open-source multi-image/video vision-language benchmarks, and 4 vision-speech benchmarks. Additionally, we compare Phi-4-Multimodal with multiple state-of-the-art open-source models: our previous Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24], Qwen2.5-VL-3B & 7B [Tea25b], InternVL2.5-4B & 8B [CWC+24], and close-sourced multimodal models Gemini [TAB+23], Claude-3.5 [Ant24]666Claude-3.5-Sonnet-2024-10-22, and GPT-4o [HLG+24]777GPT-4o-2024-11-20 and GPT-4o-mini-2024-07-18. For most benchmarks, we used the same internal evaluation pipeline as in Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24] to ensure fair comparisons across all baseline methods. For benchmarks (e.g., DocVQA and InfoVQA) requiring submission to an evaluation server, we directly utilized results reported in previous papers for baseline methods and submitted our own evaluations to the server to obtain results for Phi-4-Multimodal.
items.zh: 我们在表 1 中报告了 Phi-4-Multimodal 在 13 个开源学术单图像视觉-语言基准、2 个开源多图像/视频视觉-语言基准和 4 个视觉-语音基准上的评估结果。此外，我们将 Phi-4-Multimodal 与多个最先进的开源模型进行了比较：我们之前的 Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24]、Qwen2.5-VL-3B 和 7B [Tea25b]、InternVL2.5-4B 和 8B [CWC+24]，以及闭源多模态模型 Gemini [TAB+23]、Claude-3.5 [Ant24] 和 GPT-4o [HLG+24]。对于大多数基准，我们使用了与 Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24] 相同的内部评估流程，以确保所有基线方法的公平比较。对于需要提交到评估服务器的基准（例如 DocVQA 和 InfoVQA），我们直接使用了先前论文中报告的基线方法结果，并提交了我们自己的评估结果到服务器以获得 Phi-4-Multimodal 的结果。

items.en: For single-image vision-language benchmarks, the evaluations assess reasoning and perceptual capabilities across various domains, including but not limited to science, charts, OCR, and general knowledge. For multi-image/video vision-language benchmarks, we used one multi-image benchmark (BLINK [FHL+24]) and one video benchmark (VideoMME [FDL+24]). In the case of VideoMME, the evaluation setup is same as the one used in Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24], where 16 frames are extracted from each video by sampling frames at a rate ensuring uniform time coverage. These benchmarks evaluate perceptual capabilities across multiple images/frames and text, covering scenarios such as art and style recognition, forensic detection, and video understanding. For vision-speech benchmarks, we adopted four existing benchmarks from InternOmni [CWT+24], which convert text prompts into speech format for evaluation on four vision-language benchmarks. Since Claude and GPT-4o endpoints do not support audio input along with images, we do not report their numbers here. For Gemini models, promting with only image and speech input will generate free-form responses that are difficult to extract and evaluate. Therefore, we add the corresponding text instructions to prompt the model to respond with one of ABCD options or single-word-or-phrase answers for the respective ShareGPT4o benchmark.
items.zh: 对于单图像视觉-语言基准，评估评估了各个领域的推理和感知能力，包括但不限于科学、图表、OCR 和常识。对于多图像/视频视觉-语言基准，我们使用了一个多图像基准（BLINK [FHL+24]）和一个视频基准（VideoMME [FDL+24]）。对于 VideoMME，评估设置与 Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24] 中使用的相同，即通过以确保均匀时间覆盖的速率采样帧，从每个视频中提取 16 帧。这些基准评估了跨多个图像/帧和文本的感知能力，涵盖艺术和风格识别、法医检测和视频理解等场景。对于视觉-语音基准，我们采用了 InternOmni [CWT+24] 中的四个现有基准，这些基准将文本提示转换为语音格式，用于在四个视觉-语言基准上进行评估。由于 Claude 和 GPT-4o 端点不支持同时输入音频和图像，我们在此不报告它们的数字。对于 Gemini 模型，仅使用图像和语音输入进行提示会生成自由形式的响应，难以提取和评估。因此，我们添加相应的文本指令，提示模型分别针对 ShareGPT4o 基准以 ABCD 选项或单词或短语答案进行响应。

items.en: From the results in Table 1 and Table 2, we summarize Phi-4-Multimodal’s performance as follows:
items.zh: 从表 1 和表 2 的结果中，我们总结 Phi-4-Multimodal 的性能如下：

items.en: On vision-language benchmarks, Phi-4-Multimodal demonstrates significant improvements over our previous model Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24] and outperforms baseline models of similar sizes overall. Notably, in chart understanding and science reasoning tasks, Phi-4-Multimodal even surpasses some close-sourced models like Gemini and GPT-4o. We have shown one demo case in Figure 2.
items.zh: 在视觉-语言基准测试中，Phi-4-Multimodal 相比我们之前的模型 Phi-3.5-Vision [AJA+24] 表现出显著改进，并在整体上优于类似规模的基线模型。值得注意的是，在图表理解和科学推理任务中，Phi-4-Multimodal 甚至超越了某些闭源模型，如 Gemini 和 GPT-4o。我们在图 2 中展示了一个演示案例。

items.en: On vision-speech benchmarks, Phi-4-Multimodal significantly outperforms InternOmni and Gemini-2.0-Flash by a large margin, which have larger model sizes. For instance, on ShareGPT4o_AI2D and ShareGPT4o_ChartQA benchmarks, Phi-4-Multimodal achieves more than 10 points higher performance than InternOmni.
items.zh: 在视觉-语音基准测试中，Phi-4-Multimodal 大幅优于模型规模更大的 InternOmni 和 Gemini-2.0-Flash。例如，在 ShareGPT4o_AI2D 和 ShareGPT4o_ChartQA 基准测试中，Phi-4-Multimodal 的性能比 InternOmni 高出 10 个百分点以上。

items.en: Unlike other open-source vision-language models that fully fine-tune their base language models (often resulting in performance degradation on pure language benchmarks), Phi-4-Multimodal keeps the language model entirely frozen by only incorporating additional fine-tunable LoRA modules. This approach ensures that language performance remains unchanged for pure text inputs. While some academic efforts aim to enable multimodal capabilities while preserving original language performance (e.g., through added cross-attention layers [AI23, DLW+24]), these techniques often lead to performance drops on vision-language benchmarks compared to fully fine-tuned large language models. Our proposed LoRA solution provides a novel perspective for the community, maintaining language capabilities while achieving minimal performance loss on multimodal benchmarks compared to fully fine-tuned baselines.
items.zh: 与其他完全微调基础语言模型（通常导致纯语言基准测试性能下降）的开源视觉-语言模型不同，Phi-4-Multimodal 通过仅添加额外的可微调 LoRA 模块，完全冻结了语言模型。这种方法确保了纯文本输入的语言性能保持不变。虽然一些学术工作旨在在保持原始语言性能的同时实现多模态能力（例如通过添加交叉注意力层 [AI23, DLW+24]），但这些技术通常会导致视觉-语言基准测试的性能相比完全微调的大型语言模型有所下降。我们提出的 LoRA 解决方案为社区提供了一个新颖的视角，在保持语言能力的同时，与完全微调的基线相比，在多模态基准测试上实现了最小的性能损失。

items.capEn: Figure 2: One demo case to show the vision-language understanding and reasoning capability of Phi-4-Multimodal.
items.capZh: 图 2：展示 Phi-4-Multimodal 视觉-语言理解和推理能力的一个演示案例。

items.en: We evaluate the speech and audio capabilities of Phi-4-Multimodal on a variety of understanding tasks. The performance of Phi-4-Multimodal is compared with several state-of-the-art open-sourced models for the speech and audio understanding, including WhisperV3 [RKX+23], SeamlessM4T-v2 [BCM+23], Qwen2-audio [CXY+24]. We also include the performance of close-sourced multi-modal models (GPT-4o [HLG+24] and Gemini [TAB+23]) for comparisons 888Speech evaluations for closed models are done through Azure cloud API.. The results are obtained through evaluation on the exact same test data version without further clarifications. We sample the top-1 token at each generation step during inference.
items.zh: 我们在多种理解任务上评估了 Phi-4-Multimodal 的语音和音频能力。将 Phi-4-Multimodal 的性能与几种最先进的语音和音频理解开源模型进行了比较，包括 WhisperV3 [RKX+23]、SeamlessM4T-v2 [BCM+23]、Qwen2-audio [CXY+24]。我们还包含了闭源多模态模型（GPT-4o [HLG+24] 和 Gemini [TAB+23]）的性能以进行比较 888 闭源模型的语音评估通过 Azure 云 API 完成。结果是在完全相同的测试数据版本上评估得到的，未做进一步说明。在推理过程中，我们在每个生成步骤采样 top-1 token。

items.en: The main results on the speech benchmark are presented in Table 3. We summarize the performance of Phi-4-Multimodal as listed:
items.zh: 语音基准测试的主要结果见表 3。我们将 Phi-4-Multimodal 的性能总结如下：

items.en: Phi-4-Multimodal achieves very strong ASR and AST performance, surpassing the expert ASR model, WhisperV3, and expert AST model, SeamlessM4T-large-v2, on CommonVoice [ABD+20], FLEURS [CMK+23], OpenASR [SMK+23], and CoVoST2 [WWGP21] test sets.
items.zh: Phi-4-Multimodal 在 ASR 和 AST 任务上取得了非常强的性能，在 CommonVoice [ABD+20]、FLEURS [CMK+23]、OpenASR [SMK+23] 和 CoVoST2 [WWGP21] 测试集上超越了专家 ASR 模型 WhisperV3 和专家 AST 模型 SeamlessM4T-large-v2。

items.en: Phi-4-Multimodal is 5.5% relatively better in WER than the best model on the Huggingface OpenASR leaderboard999https://huggingface.co/spaces/hf-audio/open_asr_leaderboard and now ranks No.1 on the leaderboard as of 1/14/2025.
items.zh: Phi-4-Multimodal 在 Huggingface OpenASR 排行榜 999https://huggingface.co/spaces/hf-audio/open_asr_leaderboard 上的 WER 相对优于最佳模型 5.5%，截至 2025 年 1 月 14 日，在该排行榜上排名第一。

items.en: Phi-4-Multimodal is the first open-sourced model with speech summarization capability. The summarization quality is close to that of GPT-4o in the sense of adherence and low hallucinations.
items.zh: Phi-4-Multimodal 是首个具备语音摘要能力的开源模型。在忠实度和低幻觉方面，其摘要质量接近 GPT-4o。

items.en: Phi-4-Multimodal is the smallest open-sourced multi-modal LLM that behaves better than the open-sourced Qwen2-audio [CXY+24] with ∼\sim2x in size.
items.zh: Phi-4-Multimodal 是性能优于开源 Qwen2-audio [CXY+24]（规模约为其两倍）的最小开源多模态 LLM。

items.en: We should notice in Table 3 that Phi-4-Multimodal is optimized for speech and audio understanding tasks while Gemini and GPT-4o might be optimized towards chat experience. That may be the reason why Phi-4-Multimodal outperforms Gemini-2.0-Flash and GPT-4o on ASR and AST tasks while lags behind on the SQQA tasks. We describe the benchmark and evaluation details for each task below.
items.zh: 我们应注意，在表 3 中，Phi-4-Multimodal 针对语音和音频理解任务进行了优化，而 Gemini 和 GPT-4o 可能针对聊天体验进行了优化。这可能是 Phi-4-Multimodal 在 ASR 和 AST 任务上优于 Gemini-2.0-Flash 和 GPT-4o，但在 SQQA 任务上落后的原因。下面我们描述每个任务的基准测试和评估细节。

items.en: We evaluate the ASR performance on three public benchmarks: CommonVoice [ABD+20], FLEURS [CMK+23], and OpenASR [SMK+23].
items.zh: 我们在三个公开基准测试上评估 ASR 性能：CommonVoice [ABD+20]、FLEURS [CMK+23] 和 OpenASR [SMK+23]。

items.en: CommonVoice is an open-source, multilingual speech dataset developed by Mozilla. The test set of CommonVoice version 15.0 (CV15) is adopted in our evaluation, in which the data is collected before 9/13/2023. We conduct the evaluations on the eight supported languages.
items.zh: CommonVoice 是 Mozilla 开发的开源多语言语音数据集。我们的评估采用 CommonVoice 15.0 版本（CV15）的测试集，其中数据收集于 2023 年 9 月 13 日之前。我们对八种支持的语言进行了评估。

items.en: FLEURS a multilingual speech dataset designed for evaluating speech recognition and speech-to-text translation models across a wide range of languages. The models are evaluated on the test sets of the eight supported languages for ASR.
items.zh: FLEURS 是一个多语言语音数据集，旨在评估多种语言的语音识别和语音到文本翻译模型。模型在八种支持语言的 ASR 测试集上进行评估。

items.en: OpenASR Leaderboard on Hugging Face is designed for benchmarking and evaluating the robustness of ASR models on English. The datasets in the leaderboard cover diverse speech domains including reading speech, conversations, meetings, and so on.
items.zh: Hugging Face 上的 OpenASR 排行榜旨在对英语 ASR 模型的鲁棒性进行基准测试和评估。排行榜中的数据集涵盖多种语音领域，包括朗读语音、对话、会议等。

items.en: The ASR prompt for Phi-4-Multimodal is “Transcribe the audio clip into text.”, which is language agnostic. We notice that the model can learn to recognize in the target language perfectly without providing language information, while Qwen2-audio and Gemini-2.0-Flash require the language information in the prompt to obtain the optimal ASR performance. For example, the ASR prompt for Gemini-2.0-Flash is “Transcribe the audio clip into {tgt-lang}. Please ignore background noise.” We compute the Character Error Rate (CER) for Japanese and Chinese language and Word Error Rate (WER) for other six languages.
items.zh: Phi-4-Multimodal 的 ASR 提示为“Transcribe the audio clip into text.”，该提示与语言无关。我们注意到，模型可以在不提供语言信息的情况下完美地学习识别目标语言，而 Qwen2-audio 和 Gemini-2.0-Flash 需要在提示中提供语言信息才能获得最佳 ASR 性能。例如，Gemini-2.0-Flash 的 ASR 提示为“Transcribe the audio clip into {tgt-lang}. Please ignore background noise.”。我们计算日语和中文的字符错误率（CER），以及其他六种语言的词错误率（WER）。

items.en: The detailed ASR results on the three benchmarks are summarized in Table 4. Overall, we achieve the new SOTA multi-lingual ASR performance on the eight supported languages, surpassing the expert ASR models like WhisperV3. Noticeably, Phi-4-Multimodal beats the best performing model, nvidia/canary-1b, by 5.5% relative WER on the Huggingface OpenASR leaderboard and now ranks No.1 in the leaderboard to date. Phi-4-Multimodal is also better than the open-sourced Qwen2-audio with doubled model size. Note that GPT-4o is very sensitive to ASR prompt. We tried many ASR prompts and present the one with the best overall ASR results we can obtain on the test sets. The ASR prompt we finally use is “Capture the speech in written format in the language spoken, please. Don’t include any information outside of the spoken content in your response. Remove any hesitation words like um, uh. Support mixed language. Your response should be formatted as follows: Spoken Content: <<transcribed text here>>.”.
items.zh: 三个基准测试的详细 ASR 结果总结在表 4 中。总体而言，我们在八种支持的语言上取得了新的 SOTA 多语言 ASR 性能，超越了专家 ASR 模型如 WhisperV3。值得注意的是，Phi-4-Multimodal 在 Huggingface OpenASR 排行榜上以 5.5% 的相对 WER 优于最佳模型 nvidia/canary-1b，目前在该排行榜上排名第一。Phi-4-Multimodal 也优于规模为其两倍的开源 Qwen2-audio。请注意，GPT-4o 对 ASR 提示非常敏感。我们尝试了许多 ASR 提示，并展示了在测试集上能获得最佳整体 ASR 结果的提示。我们最终使用的 ASR 提示是“Capture the speech in written format in the language spoken, please. Don’t include any information outside of the spoken content in your response. Remove any hesitation words like um, uh. Support mixed language. Your response should be formatted as follows: Spoken Content: <<transcribed text here>>.”。

items.en: We evaluate the AST performance on two public benchmarks: CoVoST2 [WWGP21] and FLEURS [CMK+23].
items.zh: 我们在两个公开基准测试上评估 AST 性能：CoVoST2 [WWGP21] 和 FLEURS [CMK+23]。

items.en: CoVoST2 is a multilingual speech-to-text translation dataset derived from Mozilla’s Common Voice project. It is one of the largest open datasets available for speech translation, providing support for both X-to-English (X-En) and English-to-X (En-X) translation tasks. We evaluate the directions with supported languages on the test sets.
items.zh: CoVoST2 是一个源自 Mozilla Common Voice 项目的多语言语音到文本翻译数据集。它是可用于语音翻译的最大开放数据集之一，支持 X 到英语（X-En）和英语到 X（En-X）翻译任务。我们在测试集上评估支持语言的方向。

items.en: We use the same FLEURS test audios as those in ASR evaluation but replacing the ASR transcription with the translations. We evaluate EN-X and X-EN directions with supported languages on the test sets.
items.zh: 我们使用与 ASR 评估相同的 FLEURS 测试音频，但将 ASR 转录替换为翻译。我们在测试集上评估支持语言的 EN-X 和 X-EN 方向。

items.en: The AST prompts for 0-shot and CoT evaluation are “Translate the audio to {tgt-lang}.” and “Transcribe the audio to text, and then translate the audio to {tgt-lang}. Use <s​e​p><sep> as a separator between the original transcript and the translation.”, respectively. We compute BLEU score between the reference and text translations. For CoT evaluation, the text after <s​e​p><sep> is regarded as the translation.
items.zh: AST的零样本和思维链评估提示分别为“将音频翻译成{tgt-lang}。”和“将音频转录为文本，然后将音频翻译成{tgt-lang}。使用<sep><sep>作为原始转录和翻译之间的分隔符。”我们计算参考译文和文本译文之间的BLEU分数。对于思维链评估，<sep><sep>之后的文本被视为翻译。

items.en: The detailed AST results on each translation direction are shown in Table 5. As we can see from the table, CoT inference can largely benefit the translation quality, improving 1-2 BLUE score on various test sets. Phi-4-Multimodal achieves the best AST performance among the evaluated models on CoVoST2 benchmark, including Gemini-2.0-Flash and GPT-4o. On FLEURS, Phi-4-Multimodal is better than the expert model SeamlessM4T-large-V2 and the performance is on par with GPT-4o, the size of which is much larger than Phi-4-Multimodal. We don’t apply CoT evaluation to other models since either the model does not support CoT decoding, or it is hard to find a good CoT prompt for the model to respond to each test sample correctly. Similar to ASR, Phi-4-Multimodal does not require source language information in the AST prompt.
items.zh: 每个翻译方向上的详细AST结果如表5所示。从表中可以看出，思维链推理可以大幅提升翻译质量，在各种测试集上提高1-2个BLEU分数。Phi-4-Multimodal在CoVoST2基准测试中取得了评估模型中的最佳AST性能，包括Gemini-2.0-Flash和GPT-4o。在FLEURS上，Phi-4-Multimodal优于专家模型SeamlessM4T-large-V2，性能与GPT-4o相当，而GPT-4o的规模远大于Phi-4-Multimodal。我们没有对其他模型应用思维链评估，因为要么模型不支持思维链解码，要么很难找到合适的思维链提示让模型正确响应每个测试样本。与ASR类似，Phi-4-Multimodal在AST提示中不需要源语言信息。

items.en: We evaluate the SQQA performance on two language benchmarks with synthetic audio query: MT-Bench [ZCS+23] and MMMLU [HBB+20]. The text query is synthesized into the audio query with the internal zero-shot TTS system.
items.zh: 我们在两个使用合成音频查询的语言基准测试上评估SQQA性能：MT-Bench [ZCS+23]和MMMLU [HBB+20]。文本查询通过内部零样本TTS系统合成为音频查询。

items.en: MT-Bench (Multi-turn Benchmark) is specifically designed to evaluate the conversational and instruction-following abilities of AI models in multi-turn question-answering (QA) scenarios.
items.zh: MT-Bench（多轮基准测试）专门设计用于评估AI模型在多轮问答场景中的对话和指令遵循能力。

items.en: MMMLU (Multilingual Massive Multitask Language Understanding) is an extensive benchmark designed to evaluate the general knowledge and reasoning capabilities of AI models across a wide array of subjects. We evaluate the model on the eight supported languages for this test set.
items.zh: MMMLU（多语言大规模多任务语言理解）是一个广泛的基准测试，旨在评估AI模型在广泛学科中的通用知识和推理能力。我们在此测试集上评估模型在八种支持语言上的表现。

items.en: The task prompt is null for the spoken query QA task. The metrics are different for the two benchmarks. The answer for MT-bench is open-ended, so we use GPT-4 as a judge to score the model outputs from 1 to 10. We evaluate the model outputs in the first two turns for MT-bench. Please refer to Appendix A for the judege prompts for GPT-4. MMMLU is a QA task with multiple-choice questions. We use the accuracy to measure the model quality.
items.zh: 口语查询QA任务的任务提示为空。两个基准测试的指标不同。MT-bench的答案是开放式的，因此我们使用GPT-4作为评判者，对模型输出进行1到10分的评分。我们评估MT-bench前两轮的模型输出。请参考附录A了解GPT-4的评判提示。MMMLU是一个多项选择题的QA任务。我们使用准确率来衡量模型质量。

items.en: We summarize the SQQA results in Table 6. It can be seen from the table that Phi-4-Multimodal outperforms Qwen2-audio with doubled model size on MT-bench. However, the performance lags far behind than the Gemini-2.0-Flash and GPT-4o, which show strong SQQA capability. The results on SQQA show that Phi-4-Multimodal is more good at conversational chat rather than general knowledge and reasoning chat (less gap to closed-source models on MT-bench than that on MMMLU). The reason might be that we weighed more conversational SQQA data in the speech/audio post-training stage.
items.zh: 我们在表6中总结了SQQA结果。从表中可以看出，Phi-4-Multimodal在MT-bench上优于模型规模翻倍的Qwen2-audio。然而，性能远落后于Gemini-2.0-Flash和GPT-4o，它们展示了强大的SQQA能力。SQQA的结果表明，Phi-4-Multimodal更擅长对话聊天，而非通用知识和推理聊天（在MT-bench上与闭源模型的差距小于MMMLU）。原因可能是在语音/音频后训练阶段，我们更重视对话式SQQA数据。

items.capEn: Figure 3: An example to showcase the understanding capabilities for Phi-4-Multimodal, including audio understanding, summarization, ASR, and AST.
items.capZh: 图3：展示Phi-4-Multimodal理解能力的示例，包括音频理解、摘要、ASR和AST。

items.en: We evaluate the speech summarization performance on an in-house (Golden3) and a public (AMI [CAB+05]) benchmark.
items.zh: 我们在内部（Golden3）和公开（AMI [CAB+05]）基准测试上评估语音摘要性能。

items.en: Golden3 is a real-world meeting dataset, containing 108 meeting recordings with corresponding transcripts, averaging 6 minutes each. The dataset is primarily in English, covering a wide range of topics. There are in total 1071 queries for the entire dataset, averaging 9.9 instructions for each conversation.
items.zh: Golden3是一个真实世界的会议数据集，包含108个会议录音及其对应转录，平均每个6分钟。数据集主要为英语，涵盖广泛的主题。整个数据集共有1071个查询，每个对话平均9.9条指令。

items.en: The AMI (Augmented Multi-Party Interaction) dataset is a comprehensive collection of meeting recordings, encompassing approximately 100 hours of data. These recordings feature synchronized audio and video streams, including close-talking and far-field microphones, individual and room-view cameras, and outputs from devices like slide projectors and electronic whiteboards. The dataset is primarily in English and includes contributions from both native and non-native speakers, captured in various rooms with distinct acoustic properties. The test split contains 20 meeting recordings with average duration of 32 minutes. We test on close-talking version of audio. There are 10 instructions generated for each conversation, summing up to 200 for the dataset.
items.zh: AMI（增强多方交互）数据集是一个全面的会议录音集合，包含约100小时的数据。这些录音具有同步的音频和视频流，包括近讲和远场麦克风、个人和房间视角摄像头，以及来自幻灯片投影仪和电子白板等设备的输出。数据集主要为英语，包括母语和非母语者的贡献，在不同声学特性的房间中捕获。测试集包含20个会议录音，平均时长为32分钟。我们测试近讲版本的音频。每个对话生成10条指令，总计200条。

items.en: To generate the summarization instructions for the test data, GPT-4 is employed being asked to summarize partial or the entire conversation or control the output style/length/structure. An example prompt could be “Summarize the ideas shared for making the remote control suitable for older generations.” or “Summarize in bullet points the key product specifications discussed.” The summarization instructions are regarded as task prompt for multi-model LLM inference. During evaluation, we use GPT4 to score the response corresponding to each instruction in 3 criteria: overall quality, hallucination, and instruction adherence. The overall quality, scaled 1 to 7, measures accuracy in capturing details, coherence, and writing style. The hallucination score is a binary flag that measures whether any part of the summary is fabricated or in consistent with the source content (0 represents no hallucination and vice versa). The adherence score, scaled 1 to 7, measures how well the response follows the instruction in specific format, content or length requirements. During scoring, GPT4 has access to the ground truth transcripts of each recording. Please refer to Appendix A for the GPT4 scoring prompt.
items.zh: 为了生成测试数据的摘要指令，使用GPT-4要求其总结部分或整个对话，或控制输出风格/长度/结构。示例提示可以是“总结为使遥控器适合老年一代而分享的想法。”或“用要点总结讨论的关键产品规格。”摘要指令被视为多模态LLM推理的任务提示。在评估过程中，我们使用GPT4根据三个标准对每个指令对应的响应进行评分：整体质量、幻觉和指令遵循。整体质量（1-7分）衡量细节捕捉的准确性、连贯性和写作风格。幻觉分数是一个二元标志，衡量摘要的任何部分是否虚构或与源内容一致（0表示无幻觉，反之亦然）。遵循分数（1-7分）衡量响应在特定格式、内容或长度要求上遵循指令的程度。评分时，GPT4可以访问每个录音的真实转录。请参考附录A了解GPT4评分提示。

items.en: We average the scores of all responses belong to the same dataset for each criteria. The detailed summarization scores are presented in Table 6. Qwen2-Audio has a 30-second cut-off for audio input, therefore it couldn’t deal with long-form audio input and appears incompetent in this task. Phi-4-Multimodal instead can naturally encode long-form audio in one-shot and perform speech understanding. It exhibits competitive performance on both Golden3 and AMI test sets, compared with Gemini-2.0-Flash and GPT-4o. Considering that speech summarization data contributes only 1% of the data in speech post-training, the gap can be reduced easily with finetuning on more summarization data.
items.zh: 我们对每个标准取同一数据集所有响应的平均分数。详细的摘要分数见表6。Qwen2-Audio对音频输入有30秒的截断，因此无法处理长音频输入，在此任务中表现不佳。Phi-4-Multimodal则能够自然地一次性编码长音频并进行语音理解。与Gemini-2.0-Flash和GPT-4o相比，它在Golden3和AMI测试集上均表现出竞争性性能。考虑到语音摘要数据仅占语音后训练数据的1%，通过微调更多摘要数据可以轻松缩小差距。

items.en: We evaluate the audio understanding capability on two benchmarks: AIRBench-chat [YXL+24] and MMAU [STK+24].
items.zh: 我们在两个基准测试上评估音频理解能力：AIRBench-chat [YXL+24]和MMAU [STK+24]。

items.en: AIR-Bench (Audio Instruction and Response Benchmark) is a comprehensive evaluation framework designed to test the capabilities of large audio language models. It includes both foundation and chat benchmarks. The chat benchmark is selected for the open-end QA style evaluation. The chat benchmark includes the categories of music, sound, speech and mixed domain.
items.zh: AIR-Bench（音频指令和响应基准测试）是一个全面的评估框架，旨在测试大型音频语言模型的能力。它包括基础基准和聊天基准。选择聊天基准用于开放式问答风格评估。聊天基准包括音乐、声音、语音和混合领域类别。

items.en: The MMAU (Massive Multi-Task Audio Understanding) benchmark is a comprehensive dataset designed to evaluate the capabilities of multi-modal models in audio-based understanding and reasoning tasks. The test sets are in the form of multiple-choices QA, covering the categories of music, sound, and speech.
items.zh: MMAU（大规模多任务音频理解）基准测试是一个全面的数据集，旨在评估多模态模型在音频理解和推理任务中的能力。测试集采用多项选择题问答形式，涵盖音乐、声音和语音类别。

items.en: Similar to open-ended QA as MT-bench, we use GPT-4-0613 as a judge to score the model outputs. Please refer to the Appendix A for the GPT4 scoring prompt. The accuracy is used to measure the model quality on MMAU.
items.zh: 与MT-bench的开放式问答类似，我们使用GPT-4-0613作为评判者对模型输出进行评分。请参考附录A了解GPT4评分提示。在MMAU上使用准确率衡量模型质量。

items.en: The detailed results on each category for multi-model models are presented in Table 6. Although we freeze the audio encoder in post-training, Phi-4-Multimodal achieves strong speech, audio, and music understanding capability on the two evaluated benchmarks, surpassing the open-sourced Qwen2-audio. The GPT-4o does not perform well on the audio and music understanding tasks because the models may not respond to the audio/music inputs for some test samples. In other words, GPT-4o is either sensitive to the prompts for audio and music understanding tasks .
items.zh: 多模态模型在每个类别上的详细结果见表6。尽管我们在后训练中冻结了音频编码器，Phi-4-Multimodal在两个评估基准上仍展现出强大的语音、音频和音乐理解能力，超越了开源的Qwen2-audio。GPT-4o在音频和音乐理解任务上表现不佳，因为模型可能无法对某些测试样本的音频/音乐输入做出响应。换句话说，GPT-4o对音频和音乐理解任务的提示较为敏感。

items.en: We showcase an example for strong speech understanding capabilities of Phi-4-Multimodal in Figure 3.
items.zh: 我们在图3中展示了一个Phi-4-Multimodal强大语音理解能力的示例。

items.en: We have conducted benchmarks on various different academic datasets. We compare the scores with the latest open-source models - Qwen 2.5 [YYZ+24], Llama-3.2 [DJP+24], Ministral [Mis24] and Gemma2 [TRP+24] series. Overall, we observe Phi-4-Mini shows very strong performance across different benchmarks as shown in Table 7.
items.zh: 我们在各种不同的学术数据集上进行了基准测试。我们将得分与最新的开源模型——Qwen 2.5 [YYZ+24]、Llama-3.2 [DJP+24]、Ministral [Mis24] 和 Gemma2 [TRP+24] 系列进行了比较。总体而言，我们观察到 Phi-4-Mini 在不同基准测试中表现出非常强劲的性能，如表 7 所示。

items.en: Overall performance: Across different language understanding benchmarks, Phi-4-Mini outperforms similar size models size models and on-par with the models with 2 times larger. Especially, Phi-4-Mini outperforms most of the larger models except for Qwen2.5 7B with large margins as well as similar sized models.
items.zh: 整体性能：在不同的语言理解基准测试中，Phi-4-Mini 优于相似规模的模型，并与规模大两倍的模型持平。特别是，Phi-4-Mini 以较大优势优于除 Qwen2.5 7B 之外的大多数更大模型，以及相似规模的模型。

items.en: Strong Math and Reasoning capabilities: Phi-4-Mini excels on math and reasoning related benchmarks thanks to the reasoning-rich synthetic data it’s trained on. For the Math benchmark, the model outperforms similar sized model with large margins sometimes more 20 points. It even outperforms two times larger models’ scores.
items.zh: 强大的数学和推理能力：Phi-4-Mini 在数学和推理相关基准测试中表现出色，这得益于其训练所用的富含推理的合成数据。在数学基准测试中，该模型以较大优势（有时超过 20 分）优于相似规模的模型，甚至超过规模大两倍的模型的得分。

items.en: Excellent instruction following and function calling performance: Compared to the predecessor Phi-3.5-Mini, Phi-4-Mini shows significantly improved performance on instruction following and function calling thanks to the curated data and improved post-training.
items.zh: 卓越的指令遵循和函数调用性能：与之前的 Phi-3.5-Mini 相比，Phi-4-Mini 在指令遵循和函数调用方面表现出显著提升，这得益于精心策划的数据和改进的后训练。

items.en: Strong coding performance: Phi-4-Mini’s strong reasoning capabilities are also shown on the coding tasks thanks to the curated organic and synthetic data. In the HumanEval benchmark, Phi-4-Mini outperforms most of the similar sized and two times larger sized models.
items.zh: 强大的编码性能：Phi-4-Mini 强大的推理能力也体现在编码任务上，这得益于精心策划的有机数据和合成数据。在 HumanEval 基准测试中，Phi-4-Mini 优于大多数相似规模和规模大两倍的模型。

items.en: In Phi-4-Mini training, we have put special emphasis on the coding capability. We have collected high quality code data and generated various code related data. As a result, Phi-4-Mini shows very strong performance on coding tasks as shown in the Table 8. Across 9 different coding benchmarks, Phi-4-Mini outperforms all 3B sized model and 8B sized model except for Qwen2.5 on the average score.
items.zh: 在 Phi-4-Mini 训练中，我们特别强调了编码能力。我们收集了高质量的代码数据，并生成了各种与代码相关的数据。因此，Phi-4-Mini 在编码任务上表现出非常强劲的性能，如表 8 所示。在 9 个不同的编码基准测试中，Phi-4-Mini 在平均得分上优于所有 3B 规模模型和除 Qwen2.5 之外的 8B 规模模型。

items.en: Model AIME MATH-500 GPQA Diamond o1-mini* 63.6 90.0 60.0 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B 53.3 91.4 49.5 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B 43.3 86.9 47.3 Bespoke-Stratos-7B* 20.0 82.0 37.8 OpenThinker-7B* 31.3 83.0 42.4 Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct 6.7 44.4 25.3 Phi-4-Mini 10.0 71.8 36.9 + Distill Pre-training 30.0 82.9 42.6 + Distill Fine-tuning 43.3 89.3 48.3 + Roll-Out DPO (final reasoning-enhanced Phi-4-Mini) 50.0 90.4 49.0
items.zh: Model AIME MATH-500 GPQA Diamond o1-mini* 63.6 90.0 60.0 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B 53.3 91.4 49.5 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B 43.3 86.9 47.3 Bespoke-Stratos-7B* 20.0 82.0 37.8 OpenThinker-7B* 31.3 83.0 42.4 Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct 6.7 44.4 25.3 Phi-4-Mini 10.0 71.8 36.9 + Distill Pre-training 30.0 82.9 42.6 + Distill Fine-tuning 43.3 89.3 48.3 + Roll-Out DPO (final reasoning-enhanced Phi-4-Mini) 50.0 90.4 49.0

items.en: We evaluate the reasoning performance of a reasoning-enhanced model that we have trained over Phi-4-Mini. We show results on AIME 2024 [MAA24], MATH-500 [LKB+23], and GPQA Diamond [RHS+], comparing it against OpenAI reasoning models and several recent, larger reasoning models from Deepseek and others. Despite having only 3.8B parameters, Phi-4-Mini reasoning-enhanced model outperforms DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B [GYZ+25], Bespoke-Stratos-7B [Lab25], OpenThinker-7B [Tea25a], and achieves performance comparable to DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B as shown in the Table 9. Moreover, we present an ablation study that shows the effectiveness of our training process for reasoning-enhanced Phi-4-Mini.
items.zh: 我们评估了在 Phi-4-Mini 上训练的一个推理增强模型的推理性能。我们在 AIME 2024 [MAA24]、MATH-500 [LKB+23] 和 GPQA Diamond [RHS+] 上展示了结果，并将其与 OpenAI 推理模型以及 Deepseek 和其他公司最近推出的几个更大的推理模型进行了比较。尽管只有 3.8B 参数，Phi-4-Mini 推理增强模型在表 9 中优于 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B [GYZ+25]、Bespoke-Stratos-7B [Lab25]、OpenThinker-7B [Tea25a]，并达到了与 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B 相当的性能。此外，我们进行了一项消融研究，展示了我们针对推理增强的 Phi-4-Mini 训练过程的有效性。

items.en: Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal were developed in accordance with Microsoft’s responsible AI principles. The overall approach consisted of safety alignment in post-training, red-teaming, automated testing and evaluations across dozens of RAI harm categories.
items.zh: Phi-4-Mini 和 Phi-4-Multimodal 是根据微软的负责任 AI 原则开发的。整体方法包括后训练中的安全对齐、红队测试、自动化测试以及跨数十个 RAI 危害类别的评估。

items.en: Our approach was almost identical to the one described in the Phi-3 Technical Report [AJA+24]. Further details can be found in the Phi-3 Safety Paper [Mic24]. The main improvement was to extend our Safety post-training datasets to all Tier 1 languages by performing (and verifying) machine translation with a GPT-4o-mini model.
items.zh: 我们的方法与 Phi-3 技术报告 [AJA+24] 中描述的方法几乎相同。更多细节可在 Phi-3 安全论文 [Mic24] 中找到。主要改进是通过使用 GPT-4o-mini 模型执行（并验证）机器翻译，将我们的安全后训练数据集扩展到所有一级语言。

items.en: Helpfulness and harmlessness preference datasets [BJN+22, JLD+23] with modifications inspired by [BSA+24] and multiple in-house generated datasets were leveraged to address the RAI harm categories in safety post-training.
items.zh: 在后训练中，我们利用了有帮助性和无害性偏好数据集 [BJN+22, JLD+23]（受 [BSA+24] 启发进行了修改）以及多个内部生成的数据集，以解决 RAI 危害类别。

items.en: An independent red team at Microsoft iteratively examined Phi-4-Mini to further identify areas of improvement during the post-training process. Based on their feedback, we curated additional datasets tailored to address their insights, thereby refining the post-training dataset.
items.zh: 微软的一个独立红队在后训练过程中迭代检查了 Phi-4-Mini，以进一步确定改进领域。根据他们的反馈，我们策划了额外的数据集以针对他们的见解，从而完善了后训练数据集。

items.en: Systematic Safety evaluations were carried out as described in the Phi-3 Safety Paper [Mic24]. The main difference lied with our evaluations for Harmful Content, which now leverage Microsoft’s Azure AI Evaluation SDK. We used GPT-4o to simulate adversarial conversations with our model, and to evaluate the model’s responses toxicity along four harm categories: Violence, Sexual Content, Self-Harm, and Hateful Content. We then computed a Defect Rate for each category - the fraction of responses that did contain harmful content. Table 10 shows that our models are on par with other models of similar size, and with our previously released Phi-3.5-mini (which is not surprising, due to the similar approach for safety alignment).
items.zh: 按照 Phi-3 安全论文 [Mic24] 中的描述进行了系统性安全评估。主要区别在于我们对有害内容的评估，现在利用了微软的 Azure AI 评估 SDK。我们使用 GPT-4o 模拟与模型的对抗性对话，并评估模型响应的毒性，涵盖四个危害类别：暴力、性内容、自残和仇恨内容。然后我们计算每个类别的缺陷率——包含有害内容的响应比例。表 10 显示，我们的模型与类似规模的其他模型以及我们之前发布的 Phi-3.5-mini 相当（这并不奇怪，因为安全对齐方法相似）。

items.en: To assess the vulnerability of the model to jailbreaks (JB’s), we repeated the previous evaluation while prepending the simulated user prompts with known JB’s. The results shown in table 11 allow us to draw 2 conclusions. First, our latest Phi models are more robust to jailbreaks than our previously released Phi-3.5-mini, and than other models of similar size. Second, our models seem to manage to detect the presence of JB’s, and in such cases are even less likely to comply with prompts eliciting harmful responses. This can be seen from the Defect Rates being smaller than the ones obtained without JB’s shown in table 10.
items.zh: 为了评估模型对越狱（JB）的脆弱性，我们在模拟用户提示前添加已知的 JB，重复了之前的评估。表 11 所示的结果使我们得出两个结论。首先，我们最新的 Phi 模型比之前发布的 Phi-3.5-mini 以及其他类似规模的模型对越狱更具鲁棒性。其次，我们的模型似乎能够检测到 JB 的存在，在这种情况下，它们更不可能遵从引发有害响应的提示。这可以从缺陷率小于表 10 中未使用 JB 时获得的缺陷率看出。

items.en: To assess the ability of the model to refuse answering harmful prompts without sacrificing the ability to answer seemingly harmful but innocuous prompts, we leveraged the XSTest framework described in [RKV+23]. Two metrics were computed: the Refusal Rate to harmful prompts (IPRR a.k.a. Inappropriate Prompt Refusal Rate - the higher, the better) and the Refusal Rate to innocuous prompts (VPRR a.k.a. Valid Prompt Refusal Rate - the lower, the better). Results for Phi models and some competitor models are shown in table 12. Two conclusions can be drawn. First, both Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal are very good at refusing to answer harmful prompts. Second, when it comes to answering innocuous prompts, Phi-4-Multimodal errs a little more on the safety side compared to the rest of the field.
items.zh: 为了评估模型拒绝回答有害提示而不牺牲回答看似有害但无害提示的能力，我们利用了 [RKV+23] 中描述的 XSTest 框架。计算了两个指标：对有害提示的拒绝率（IPRR，即不当提示拒绝率——越高越好）和对无害提示的拒绝率（VPRR，即有效提示拒绝率——越低越好）。Phi 模型和一些竞争模型的结果如表 12 所示。可以得出两个结论。首先，Phi-4-Mini 和 Phi-4-Multimodal 都非常擅长拒绝回答有害提示。其次，在回答无害提示时，Phi-4-Multimodal 在安全方面比其他模型稍微保守一些。

items.en: We also evaluated the models’ tendency to produce harmful content across all Tier 1 languages by following the approach described above, that leverages the Azure AI Evaluation SDK. Defect Rates can be seen in table 13, where the numbers were averaged over the 4 harm categories (Violence, Sexual Content, Self-Harm, and Hateful Content) to produce a single number per language. These results show an improvement for both Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal compared to Phi-3.5-mini, and show comparable performance to other competitor models.
items.zh: 我们还按照上述方法，利用 Azure AI 评估 SDK，评估了模型在所有一级语言中产生有害内容的倾向。缺陷率见表 13，其中数字在 4 个危害类别（暴力、性内容、自残和仇恨内容）上取平均值，以得出每种语言的单一数字。这些结果表明，与 Phi-3.5-mini 相比，Phi-4-Mini 和 Phi-4-Multimodal 都有改进，并且与其他竞争模型的性能相当。

items.en: For the audio safety alignment of Phi-4-Multimodal, we followed an approach analogous to that of text safety alignment described above. Our audio safety datasets were obtained by performing TTS (Text-To-Speech) synthesis on our text safety datasets. We want to acknowledge two limitations of this approach.
items.zh: 对于 Phi-4-Multimodal 的音频安全对齐，我们采用了与上述文本安全对齐类似的方法。我们的音频安全数据集是通过对文本安全数据集进行 TTS（文本到语音）合成获得的。我们想承认这种方法的两个局限性。

items.en: Our audio safety datasets are voice-only. No other types of sounds (non-speech) were included.
items.zh: 我们的音频安全数据集仅包含语音。没有包含其他类型的声音（非语音）。

items.en: We did not train against audio-specific jailbreaks.
items.zh: 我们没有针对音频特定的越狱进行训练。

items.en: For audio safety evaluations, we carried out three families of automated evaluations. First, like we did with text inputs, we leveraged Microsoft’s Azure AI Evaluation SDK to detect the presence of harmful content in the model’s responses to speech prompts. The Defect Rates are shown in table 14. Although somewhat higher than those obtained with GPT-4o (a model of much bigger size), they are comparable to those shown in table 10 for text inputs.
items.zh: 对于音频安全评估，我们进行了三类自动化评估。首先，与文本输入类似，我们利用微软的 Azure AI 评估 SDK 检测模型对语音提示的响应中是否存在有害内容。缺陷率见表 14。虽然略高于 GPT-4o（一个规模更大的模型）的结果，但与表 10 中文本输入的结果相当。

items.en: Second, we ran Microsoft’s Speech Fairness evaluation to verify that Speech-To-Text transcription worked well across a variety of demographics - as measured by the WER metric. The audio samples were spread across 2 gender sub-groups, and 3 age sub-groups (17-30, 31-45, and 46-65). The following locales (corresponding to Tier 1 languages) were considered: it-IT, fr-FR, ja-JP, es-MX, pt-BR, es-ES, zh-CN, en-US, en-GB, and de-DE.
items.zh: 其次，我们运行了微软的语音公平性评估，以验证语音到文本转录在不同人口统计群体中的表现——通过词错误率（WER）指标衡量。音频样本分布在 2 个性别子组和 3 个年龄子组（17-30、31-45 和 46-65）中。考虑了以下区域（对应一级语言）：it-IT、fr-FR、ja-JP、es-MX、pt-BR、es-ES、zh-CN、en-US、en-GB 和 de-DE。

items.en: No sub-group with egregiously worse performance than the overall population was found. Some sub-groups did have slightly better/worse performance than the overall population in their given locale. The sub-groups with slightly better performance than the overall population were: it-IT 17-30, es-MX 46-65, es-ES 17-30, en-US Female, en-US 46-65, and de-DE 46-65. The sub-groups with slightly worse performance than the overall population were: en-US Male and es-MX 17-30.
items.zh: 未发现任何子组的性能显著差于整体人群。某些子组在其所在区域内的表现略好或略差于整体人群。表现略好的子组包括：it-IT 17-30、es-MX 46-65、es-ES 17-30、en-US 女性、en-US 46-65 和 de-DE 46-65。表现略差的子组包括：en-US 男性和 es-MX 17-30。

items.en: Third, we implemented a custom evaluation to assess whether the model would infer Sensitive Attributes (SA’s) from the voice of a user - ideally, it should not. The 12 SA’s were: Race, Sexual Orientation, Political Orientation, Religious Beliefs, Trade Union Membership, Personality Characteristics, Age, Gender, Medical Conditions, Country or Region of Origin, Social Economic Status, and Profession). We used a variety of voices and prepared hundreds of audio prompts containing a “prompt seed”, and an explicit ask for the model to infer the SA. Prompt seeds were either a generic truth (e.g. “Fire is hot.”) or a first-person statement about the user that had no obvious relation to the SA (e.g. “I am 6 feet tall.”). We then used GPT-4 to determine whether the model responses did contain an inference of the SA’s.
items.zh: 第三，我们实施了一项自定义评估，以检查模型是否会从用户的声音中推断出敏感属性（SA）——理想情况下不应如此。12 个 SA 包括：种族、性取向、政治倾向、宗教信仰、工会会员身份、个性特征、年龄、性别、医疗状况、原籍国或地区、社会经济地位和职业。我们使用了多种声音，并准备了数百个音频提示，其中包含一个“提示种子”和一个明确要求模型推断 SA 的指令。提示种子要么是一个通用事实（例如“火是热的”），要么是一个关于用户的第一人称陈述，与 SA 没有明显关联（例如“我身高 6 英尺”）。然后，我们使用 GPT-4 判断模型响应是否包含对 SA 的推断。

items.en: The results were as follows. Without any additional mitigation measure, Phi-4-Multimodal performed the inference of SA (ISA) on 27% of our test prompts – less frequently than Qwen2-Audio (49%). For both models, Personality Characteristics and Country or Region of Origin were the SA’s most likely to be inferred. ISA can be very well mitigated for Phi-4-Multimodal by using a system prompt, which brings down the Defect Rate to 0.4% - comparable to the 2% we measured for GTP-4o deployed to a real-time audio endpoint that uses Microsoft’s meta prompt to prevent ISA.
items.zh: 结果如下。在没有额外缓解措施的情况下，Phi-4-Multimodal 在 27% 的测试提示中执行了 SA 推断（ISA）——低于 Qwen2-Audio（49%）。对于两个模型，个性特征和原籍国或地区是最容易被推断的 SA。通过使用系统提示，可以很好地缓解 Phi-4-Multimodal 的 ISA，将缺陷率降至 0.4%——与我们在部署到实时音频端点的 GPT-4o 上测得的 2% 相当，该端点使用微软的元提示来防止 ISA。

items.en: In addition to these automated evaluations, extensive red teaming was performed by an independent group within Microsoft. The red teaming effort focused on the following safety areas: harmful content, self-injury risks, and exploits. Phi-4-Multimodal was found to be more susceptible to providing undesirable outputs when attacked with context manipulation or persuasive techniques. These findings apply to all languages, with the susceptibility to persuasive techniques mostly affecting French and Italian.
items.zh: 除了这些自动化评估外，微软内部的一个独立小组还进行了广泛的红队测试。红队测试重点关注以下安全领域：有害内容、自伤风险和利用。发现 Phi-4-Multimodal 在受到上下文操纵或说服技巧攻击时更容易提供不良输出。这些发现适用于所有语言，其中对说服技巧的敏感性主要影响法语和意大利语。

items.en: To assess model safety in scenarios involving both text and images, we utilized Microsoft’s Azure AI Evaluation SDK. This tool enables the simulation of single-turn conversations with the target model by providing prompt text and images specifically designed to elicit harmful responses. The target model’s responses are then evaluated by a fine-tuned GPT-4o model across multiple harm categories, including violence, sexual content, self-harm, hateful or unfair content. Each response is assigned a severity score based on the level of harm identified. We compared the vision safety evaluation of Phi-4-Multimodal with those of Phi-3.5-Vision, open-source models of comparable size, as well as OpenAI models.
items.zh: 为了评估模型在涉及文本和图像场景中的安全性，我们使用了微软的 Azure AI 评估 SDK。该工具通过提供专门设计用于引发有害响应的提示文本和图像，模拟与目标模型的单轮对话。然后，由微调后的 GPT-4o 模型在多个有害类别（包括暴力、色情内容、自残、仇恨或不公平内容）上评估目标模型的响应。每个响应根据识别出的有害程度分配一个严重性分数。我们将 Phi-4-Multimodal 的视觉安全评估与 Phi-3.5-Vision、同等规模的开源模型以及 OpenAI 模型进行了比较。

items.en: In addition, we ran both an internal and the public RTVLM [LLY+24] and VLGuard [ZBY+24] multi-modal (text & vision) RAI benchmarks. In table 15, we compare vision safety metrics of Phi-4-Multimodal with Phi-3.5-Vision, the open-source models Llava-1.6 [LLL+24] and Qwen-VL-Chat [BBY+23], as well as GPT4-V [Ope23].
items.zh: 此外，我们还运行了内部和公开的 RTVLM [LLY+24] 和 VLGuard [ZBY+24] 多模态（文本和视觉）RAI 基准测试。在表 15 中，我们将 Phi-4-Multimodal 的视觉安全指标与 Phi-3.5-Vision、开源模型 Llava-1.6 [LLL+24] 和 Qwen-VL-Chat [BBY+23] 以及 GPT4-V [Ope23] 进行了比较。

items.en: Due to the model size limitation, the model could not remember some specific facts such as information of Olympic games results. Also, multilingual capability is limited by the number of model parameters. As we emphasize more on the coding data, multilingual data ratio went down. This results in worse performance on other languages than English.
items.zh: 由于模型规模限制，模型无法记住某些具体事实，例如奥运会结果的信息。此外，多语言能力受限于模型参数数量。由于我们更强调编码数据，多语言数据比例下降。这导致在英语以外的其他语言上性能较差。

items.en: Like every other model, both Phi-4-Mini and Phi-4-Multimodal can sometimes output undesirable content. We stress the importance for developers to implement application-level measures to further mitigate the impact of harmful responses. Mitigation strategies include (but are not limited to) system prompts, content filters, etc.
items.zh: 与其他模型一样，Phi-4-Mini 和 Phi-4-Multimodal 有时会输出不良内容。我们强调开发者实施应用级措施以进一步减轻有害响应影响的重要性。缓解策略包括（但不限于）系统提示、内容过滤器等。

items.en: Phi-4-Multimodal is not designed or intended to be used as a biometric categorization system to categorize individuals based on their biometric data to deduce or infer their race, political opinions, trade union membership, religious or philosophical beliefs, sex life, or sexual orientation.
items.zh: Phi-4-Multimodal 并非设计或意图用作生物特征分类系统，以根据个体的生物特征数据对其进行分类，从而推断或推断其种族、政治观点、工会会员身份、宗教或哲学信仰、性生活或性取向。
